title: Use These 17 Claude Plugins, It Will Make You 10x Better.
summary: A video guide covering 17 Claude plugins and extensions organized by use case: design, productivity, and data. Examples include Firecrawl for web scraping, Playwright CLI for browser automation, Obsidian for note-taking integration, LightRAG for retrieval-augmented generation, and GitHub CLI for version control. These tools extend Claude's functionality through skills and plugin integrations.
writeup: Chase AI walks through 17 Claude plugins and extensions, grouped by use case across design, productivity, and data. The featured tools include Firecrawl for web scraping, Playwright CLI for browser automation, Obsidian for note-taking integration, LightRAG for retrieval-augmented generation, and GitHub CLI for version control. The takeaway is that these integrations extend Claude's functionality through agent skills and plugins, connecting it to external workflows rather than relying on the base model alone.
